node.html:
Architected Python backend services supporting $1B+ annual advertising spend, millions of campaign events, and near real-time analytics for customer-facing and internal platform systems.

  • Created 15+ REST APIs and microservices that improved reliability and reduced integration effort.
  • Orchestrated Kafka and RabbitMQ event pipelines processing millions of messages per day.
  • Optimized PostgreSQL queries, indexing strategies, and Redis caching layers, reducing API response times by 40-60%.
  • Deployed 20+ services on AWS using Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform, reducing deployment times by 70%.
  • Strengthened Datadog monitoring, centralized logging, and CI/CD workflows while maintaining 99.9% availability.

Designed Python automation frameworks for API, UI, and integration testing, expanding regression coverage and accelerating release verification across engineering teams.

  • Covered 200+ automated test scenarios and increased regression coverage by 60%.
  • Integrated third-party APIs and end-to-end suites that reduced manual QA effort by 30+ hours per sprint.
  • Implemented Jenkins and GitHub Actions validation workflows, cutting release verification time by 75%.
  • Helped engineering teams identify and resolve 100+ production and pre-release defects.
  • Built environment management automation that reduced setup time from hours to minutes.

Engineered full-stack web applications and backend services for 20+ client engagements across real estate, healthcare, e-commerce, and financial services.

  • Delivered custom REST APIs and workflow automation that reduced operational overhead by 25-40%.
  • Partnered directly with stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver projects valued at $20M+.
  • Contributed across architecture, development, testing, deployment, and production support.
  • Managed 5+ concurrent client projects while consistently meeting delivery timelines and quality standards.
